title: ClawsJoy 品牌Logo
content: <svg width="300" height="100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="300" height="100" fill="#667eea" rx="15"/><text x="150" y="45" text-anchor="middle" fill="white" font-size="28" font-weight="bold">ClawsJoy</text><text x="150" y="70" text-anchor="middle" fill="#c3d0fe" font-size="14">让AI安全地为每个人工作</text></svg>

title: ClawsJoy 品牌设计稿
content: <svg width="400" height="150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="grad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#667eea"/><stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#764ba2"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="400" height="150" fill="url(#grad)" rx="20"/><text x="200" y="55" text-anchor="middle" fill="white" font-size="36" font-weight="bold">ClawsJoy</text><text x="200" y="85" text-anchor="middle" fill="#c3d0fe" font-size="16">让AI安全地为每个人工作</text><text x="200" y="110" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e0e7ff" font-size="12">工具易上手，结果令人愉悦</text></svg>
